attributes.description: Hardware telemetry across every gaming session: GPU/CPU utilisation, memory, storage throughput, and power. Filter by GPU model or game to isolate hardware-specific behaviour.

embeddableConfig.content:
## System Health
Hardware telemetry across every gaming session: temperatures, clock speeds, power draw, memory usage, and storage throughput. Filter by GPU model or game to isolate hardware-specific behaviour. For per-thread CPU scheduler analysis, open **[Engine & Diagnostics](/app/dashboards#/view/rigsignal-engine)**. For driver and Proton compatibility context, open **[Software Stack](/app/dashboards#/view/rigsignal-software)**.

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.gpu-default | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 1 | KEEP host.name
FROM metrics-rigsignal.gpu-default | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 1 | KEEP host.name
FROM metrics-rigsignal.cpu-default | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 1 | KEEP host.name
FROM metrics-rigsignal.cpu-default | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 1 | KEEP host.name
FROM metrics-rigsignal.memory-default | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 1 | STATS `System RAM Total (MB)` = MAX(rigsignal.memory.total_mb)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.memory-default | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 1 | STATS `System RAM Total (MB)` = MAX(rigsignal.memory.total_mb)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.gpu-default | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 1 | STATS `GPU VRAM Total (MB)` = MAX(rigsignal.gpu.memory_total_mb)
FROM metrics-rigsignal.gpu-default | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 1 | STATS `GPU VRAM Total (MB)` = MAX(rigsignal.gpu.memory_total_mb)

embeddableConfig.content:
### Per-Thread Scheduler (pending eBPF data)
_Per-thread panels will be added once `metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-*` has data._

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.gpu-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `GPU Utilisation (%)` = AVG(rigsignal.gpu.utilisation_pct) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.gpu-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `GPU Utilisation (%)` = AVG(rigsignal.gpu.utilisation_pct) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.title: GPU VRAM Used vs Total Over Time (Average MB)

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.gpu-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `GPU VRAM Used (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.gpu.memory_used_mb), `GPU VRAM Total (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.gpu.memory_total_mb) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.gpu-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `GPU VRAM Used (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.gpu.memory_used_mb), `GPU VRAM Total (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.gpu.memory_total_mb) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Power State Over Time (AC vs Battery)

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.power-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | EVAL `Power State` = CASE(rigsignal.power.ac_connected == true, "AC Connected", "Battery") | STATS `Readings` = COUNT(*) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Power State` | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.power-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | EVAL `Power State` = CASE(rigsignal.power.ac_connected == true, "AC Connected", "Battery") | STATS `Readings` = COUNT(*) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Power State` | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.cpu-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `CPU Utilisation (%)` = AVG(rigsignal.cpu.total_utilisation_pct) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.cpu-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `CPU Utilisation (%)` = AVG(rigsignal.cpu.total_utilisation_pct) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.cpu-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `CPU Clock Avg (MHz)` = AVG(rigsignal.cpu.clock_mhz_avg) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.cpu-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `CPU Clock Avg (MHz)` = AVG(rigsignal.cpu.clock_mhz_avg) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.title: System Memory Usage Over Time — Average Used MB vs Available MB

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.memory-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Memory Used (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.memory.used_mb), `Memory Available (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.memory.available_mb) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.memory-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Memory Used (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.memory.used_mb), `Memory Available (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.memory.available_mb) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Game RSS Memory Usage (MB) and Memory Used (%) Over Time

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.memory-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Game RSS (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.memory.game_rss_mb), `Memory Used (%)` = AVG(rigsignal.memory.used_pct) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.memory-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Game RSS (MB)` = AVG(rigsignal.memory.game_rss_mb), `Memory Used (%)` = AVG(rigsignal.memory.used_pct) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Storage Throughput Over Time — Average Read & Write Bytes/s

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.storage-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Read (bytes/s)` = AVG(rigsignal.storage.read_bytes_per_sec), `Write (bytes/s)` = AVG(rigsignal.storage.write_bytes_per_sec) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.storage-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Read (bytes/s)` = AVG(rigsignal.storage.read_bytes_per_sec), `Write (bytes/s)` = AVG(rigsignal.storage.write_bytes_per_sec) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Power Profile Over Time — AC Connected vs Battery Reading Counts

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.power-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | EVAL ac_state = CASE(rigsignal.power.ac_connected == true, "AC Connected", "Battery") | STATS `Count` = COUNT(*) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), ac_state | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.power-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | EVAL ac_state = CASE(rigsignal.power.ac_connected == true, "AC Connected", "Battery") | STATS `Count` = COUNT(*) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), ac_state | SORT bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Hardware Configurations Seen — Distinct Combinations by Host, Graphics API, VRAM, RAM & Agent Version

query.esql: FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Sessions` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id), `VRAM Total (MB)` = MAX(rigsignal.gpu.memory_total_mb), `RAM Total (MB)` = MAX(rigsignal.memory.total_mb) BY `Host` = host.name, `Graphics API` = rigsignal.game.graphics_api, `Agent Version` = rigsignal.session.agent_version | SORT `Sessions` DESC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.* | STATS `Sessions` = COUNT_DISTINCT(rigsignal.session.id), `VRAM Total (MB)` = MAX(rigsignal.gpu.memory_total_mb), `RAM Total (MB)` = MAX(rigsignal.memory.total_mb) BY `Host` = host.name, `Graphics API` = rigsignal.game.graphics_api, `Agent Version` = rigsignal.session.agent_version | SORT `Sessions` DESC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | STATS `Max Runqueue Latency (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_max_us) BY `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT `Max Runqueue Latency (µs)` DESC | LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | STATS `Max Runqueue Latency (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_max_us) BY `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT `Max Runqueue Latency (µs)` DESC | LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Max Avg Runqueue Latency (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_avg_us) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Max Avg Runqueue Latency (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_avg_us) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Switch Count` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.switch_count) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Switch Count` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.switch_count) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Migration Count` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.migration_count) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Migration Count` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.migration_count) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Runqueue Avg (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_avg_us), `Runqueue Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_max_us) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend | STATS `Runqueue Avg (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_avg_us), `Runqueue Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_max_us) BY bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT bucket ASC

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | STATS `Switch Count` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.switch_count), `Migration Count` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.migration_count), `Runqueue Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_max_us), `Runqueue Avg (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_avg_us) BY `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT `Runqueue Max (µs)` DESC | LIMIT 25

FROM metrics-rigsignal.ebpf_thread-default | STATS `Switch Count` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.switch_count), `Migration Count` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.migration_count), `Runqueue Max (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_max_us), `Runqueue Avg (µs)` = MAX(rigsignal.ebpf_thread.runqueue_avg_us) BY `Thread` = rigsignal.ebpf_thread.comm | SORT `Runqueue Max (µs)` DESC | LIMIT 25

attributes.title: RigSignal: System Health
